parent_node.description: The ID of the parent node being branched from.

proposed_slug.description: A short descriptive name for this new approach/hypothesis.

changed_axes.description: A summary of what parameters or code approaches are being changed compared to the parent.

duplication_justification.description: Explanation of why this approach is novel and not a duplicate of past attempts in the registry.

experiment_spec.description: The structured spec for running the experiment.

env_keys.description: Environment variables to pass to the run_experiment script.

run_command.description: The command arguments to pass after the -- in run_experiment.sh (e.g. ['torchrun', '--standalone', 'train_gpt.py']).

plan_notes.description: Any additional reasoning or notes for the plan.
